mitigations.mitigation_name: Enable strict egress filtering and DoS protection on the FortiGate perimeter firewall: enforce per-source ICMP rate-limits / traffic policing, enable anti-spoofing (unicast RPF/ingress filtering), and apply DoS/connection limits so a single internal host cannot generate high-rate ICMP floods to external hosts.

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "compromised-host"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
set protocol 1
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "block-icmp-egress"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "compromised-host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set status enable
next
end

config system interface
edit "port2"
set src-check enable
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set interface "port2"
set srcaddr "compromised-host"
set service "PING"
set status enable
set log enable
set anomaly imap enable
set rule 1
set status enable
config rule
edit 1
set protocol 1
set per-ip 100
set action block
next
end
next
end
